seo_title: HMB for Women Over 40: Does It Actually Prevent Muscle Loss? (Research Review)
meta_description: HMB has real science behind it, but does it work for healthy women over 40? We review the evidence honestly, including what it does and doesn't do for sarcopenia prevention.
